title: X7’s Burger
description: Turns your cooked beef into a delicious burger.
body:
🍔 X7’s Burger 🍔

✨ Features:
- Simple
- Clean
- Lightweight
- Compatible

🎮 How to Install:  
1. Download the pack (.zip file).  
2. Drop it into your `resourcepacks` folder.  
3. Open Minecraft → Settings → Resource Packs → Activate it.  
4. Enjoy your Burger!
